display.purpose: Screen titles and hero headings. Appears once per screen.

body.purpose: All UI copy, navigation, forms. 13px Space Grotesk.

label.purpose: Status badges, metric values, table data. 11px JetBrains Mono.

shadows.name: status-glow
shadows.purpose: Status dot legibility for success/emerald state.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default state transitions: hover color, nav collapse.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Tablet and below: collapsed sidebar, bottom tab nav.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary call-to-action. Beacon gold, square, used sparingly.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; background: #FBBF24; color: #06090F; border: none; border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FCD34D; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Navy elevated background, subtle border.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; background: #0F1828; color: #F1F5F9; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #152035; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Minimal action. Transparent, muted text, reveals on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; background: transparent; color: #94A3B8; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #F1F5F9; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive action. Rose alert border and text.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; background: transparent; color: #FB7185; border: 1px solid #FB7185; border-radius: 0; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: rgba(251,113,133,0.1); } .ds-btn-danger:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: default; }

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Underlined tab strip. Active tab gets beacon gold underline and text.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs" role="tablist"><button class="ds-tab active" role="tab" aria-selected="true">Overview</button><button class="ds-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Documents</button><button class="ds-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Reports</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 2px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-tab { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; color: #94A3B8; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-tab:hover { color: #F1F5F9; } .ds-tab.active { color: #FBBF24; border-bottom-color: #FBBF24; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search/filter field with leading icon. Square, navy elevated.
components.css: .ds-search { position: relative; width: 240px; } .ds-search-icon { position: absolute; left: 10px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); display: flex; pointer-events: none; } .ds-search-input { width: 100%; background: #0F1828; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 0; color: #F1F5F9; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; padding: 8px 10px 8px 32px; outline: none; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #475569; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Colored dot + monospace label for status display.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); border-radius: 0; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #94A3B8; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-status-dot { display: block; width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; background: #475569; } .ds-status-dot.success { background: #34D399; box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(52,211,153,0.4); } .ds-status-dot.warning { background: #FBBF24; box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(251,191,36,0.5); } .ds-status-dot.error { background: #FB7185; box-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(251,113,133,0.4); }

components.name: Modal
components.description: Square modal with header, scrollable body, optional footer. Deep shadow backdrop.
components.html:
Confirm Action

Are you sure?
components.css: .ds-modal-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 5000; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px; background: rgba(6,9,15,0.6); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .ds-modal { width: 460px; max-width: 100%; max-height: 86vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: #0B1120; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.65); animation: dsModalEnter 200ms ease-out; } .ds-modal-header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; padding: 15px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-modal-header h3 { margin: 0; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #F1F5F9; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-modal-header button { width: 28px; height: 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; background: transparent; border: none; color: #94A3B8; cursor: pointer; } .ds-modal-header button:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #F1F5F9; } .ds-modal-body { padding: 18px; overflow-y: auto; color: #F1F5F9; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; } .ds-modal-footer { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 13px 18px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } @keyframes dsModalEnter { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.94); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-modal { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview:
Neuranet is a precision instrument for seeing structure in noise. The interface is not a dashboard to check — it's an observatory to dwell in. Every surface, every spacing decision, every color assignment serves the analyst's deep-focus session: reduce glare, surface signal, eliminate distraction.

The system is dark-native, flat, and typographic. It rejects the SaaS dashboard aesthetic (gradient cards, widget chrome, decorative dropshadows) in favor of tonal depth: four navy layers that rise toward the analyst without shadows, and a single beacon-gold accent used sparingly — ≤10% of any given screen — so its presence always means pay attention here.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal elevation over shadow elevation — depth through background color, not drop-shadow
Single-accent restraint — beacon gold marks focus, selection, and primary action
Monospace data, sans-serif chrome — JetBrains Mono for values, Space Grotesk for labels
Square geometry throughout — rounded-none is the default
Information-dense without clutter — every pixel justifies its presence

rules.name: The Beacon Rule
rules.body: Beacon Gold appears on ≤10% of any given screen. Primary buttons, the active nav indicator, and graph highlights share this one color. If you need a second accent, you need a different hierarchy, not a different hue.

rules.name: The Observatory Rule
rules.body: Background surfaces are navy-tinted toward cool blue, never warm. The observatory is dark and cool; warmth comes exclusively from the beacon gold accent.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk at one optical size and JetBrains Mono at one optical size. No third font family. Hierarchy comes from size, color, and position.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No surface carries a box-shadow at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to a specific functional need (modal separation, status legibility).

dos: Use tonal elevation (bg-base → bg-surface → bg-elevated → bg-overlay) instead of box-shadows for depth
Keep beacon gold on ≤10% of any screen
Use JetBrains Mono for all data values, metrics, statuses, and timestamps
Maintain rounded-none as the default; only apply radius when there's a specific functional reason
Ensure body text meets ≥4.5:1 contrast against its background
donts: Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blurs
Don't add a second accent color — beacon gold is the only accent
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't introduce rounded corners on interactive elements
Don't add drop shadows to cards, buttons, or surfaces at rest
Don't use warm-tinted backgrounds (cream, sand, beige, warm gray)
Don't introduce additional font families beyond Space Grotesk and JetBrains Mono
Don't use SaaS marketing patterns: gradient heroes, stock illustrations, pricing tables
Don't add gamification elements: achievements, confetti, playful mascots
